subject: TCloud Services Request - IRS - Anthropic Claude Token Renewal
body:
Hi Renata,

IRS is submitting a TCloud Services Request for a renewal of our Anthropic Claude token allocation. This is a renewal of R-01234, which is projected to reach 75% consumption within the next 60 days. The renewal request is for $10,000.00 in token spend for FY26 continuation. POC is myself, Angela Davis. Intake form is attached.

Please let me know next steps.

Thanks,
Angela Davis
IRS

subject: RE: TCloud Services Request - IRS - R-05526 Logged
body:
Angela,

Thanks for the submission. I've logged this in ServiceNow as SNOW-21092, intake ID R-05526. This is noted as a renewal of R-01234. Routing to Diane Okafor for the proceed/no-proceed decision. Will follow up once we have a green light to move into Discovery.

Best,
Renata Cole
Intake Analyst, TCSC

subject: RE: R-05526 - Proceed Decision
body:
Renata,

Reviewed IRS's renewal request (R-05526, $10,000.00 Anthropic Claude, renewal of R-01234). Straightforward renewal at a reduced scope -- approved to proceed to Discovery.

Diane

subject: Discovery Call - R-05526 - IRS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Hi Angela, Marcus,

PMO has approved R-05526 to proceed. Since this is a renewal of R-01234, discovery should be quick -- mainly confirming whether the use case, FISMA level, and hosting model have changed. Proposing Tuesday 10am ET. Does that work?

Renata

subject: RE: Discovery Call - R-05526 - IRS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Tuesday 10am works. For context: no material changes from R-01234 -- same use case (document review), same FISMA Moderate level, same Managed hosting model. We're requesting a smaller amount this time ($10,000) because we expect the pilot to wind down by September 30th.

Angela

subject: RE: Discovery Call - R-05526 - Notes
body:
Good call. No changes to use case or technical profile from R-01234 -- confirmed FISMA Moderate, Managed hosting, Anthropic Claude via Bedrock. Reduced scope ($10,000) is consistent with winding down the pilot by 9/30. FYIdea update is minimal. Renata, this should be enough to move into Estimation.

Marcus

subject: ROM Needed - R-05526 - IRS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Greg,

Need a ROM for R-05526: IRS, $10,000.00 in Anthropic Claude tokens via AWS Bedrock, renewal of R-01234, Managed hosting model. Same fee structure as the original -- inclusive of SAIC vendor handling fee. Marcus can confirm technical details. Targeting PPM submission within 2 weeks.

Renata

subject: RE: ROM Needed - R-05526
body:
Renata,

On it. Confirming: same 3.95% SAIC handling fee as R-01234, and TCloud PMO fee applied separately at CEBD stage? Just want to make sure the ROM is consistent with how we handled the original.

Greg

subject: RE: ROM Needed - R-05526
body:
Correct -- same structure as R-01234. Base $10,000.00, plus 3.95% SAIC handling fee, then TCloud PMO fee (5%) applied separately at CEBD stage. ROM is still in progress -- let me know once you have a number so I can prepare the PPM package.

Renata
